data.title: .NET First-Class Language Support: full stack detection, routing, and scaffolding
data.description: Placeholder epic for adding .NET as a first-class supported language in DSO. Scope includes stack detection (detect-stack.sh recognizing .csproj, .sln, and dotnet CLI), project-detect.sh support for dotnet test and dotnet build in CI YAML, onboarding pre-fill for .NET commands, and architect-foundation scaffolding for .NET project structure. Modeled after the Java first-class language support epic (70d5-37ee).
